description: Frozen proof-completion prompt manifest for the 160-record LeanNumBench v1 May-2026 panel.
intended_use: Use this manifest to reproduce the May-2026 160-record proof-completion panel and local no-API checks. It is the prompt-pack freeze for the current public release leaderboard.
selection_policy: Include every checked record in the frozen 160-record LeanNumBench v1 release exactly once.
Use one proof-completion prompt per record under the full local declaration-context protocol.
Report only model outputs checked against this exact prompt pack for the 160-record proof-completion panel.
Keep earlier 123-record pilot snapshots out of the main leaderboard, hard-subset definition, and failure taxonomy.
